content:
# elizaos/eliza Daily Update (Apr 30, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
On April 30, 2026, development activity focused on community-driven proposals for integrating new service architectures and reputation systems into the Eliza framework. No code changes, bug fixes, or documentation updates were merged into the repository during this period.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS
*   **No technical developments were recorded for this date.**

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   **None**

## CLOSED ISSUES
*   **None**

## NEW ISSUES

### AI Agent Service and Reputation Integration
*   [#7211](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7211): Proposal for Hive Civilization integration, enabling character-callable x402 services on the Base mainnet for USDC settlement.
*   [#7213](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7213): Proposal to integrate SwarmScore, a portable trust and reputation rating system designed for autonomous AI agents.

## ACTIVE ISSUES
*   **None** (No issues met the criteria of having more than 3 comments).
